source_title: Force Fiber & XBraidTT Suture Tape — Brochure
text: suture with loop, non-needled, 26" suture (one end stiffened 12", other end .75") 3910900112 #2 XBraid S, white/blue, XPass shuttle loop suture, non-needled, 32" suture with 1" brummel center loop 3910900113 #2 XBraid S, blue/black, XPass shuttle loop suture, non-needled, 32" suture with 1" center loop 3910900116 #2 XBraid S, blue, suture, non-needled, 39" suture 3910900123 #2 XBraid S, blue/black, WhipStitch suture, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 18" suture loop 3910900133 #2 DualBraid S, blue+blue/black, dual braid suture, non-needled, 39" suture 3910900143 Double pack, #2 XBraid S, white/blue, suture, non-needled, 39" suture; #2 XBraid S, white/black, suture, non-needled, 39" suture 3910900052 #5 XBraid S, white/black, suture, CTX (taper, 1/2c, 48mm), 39" suture 3910900117 Needle XBraid S, MO-6 (taper, 1/2c, 26mm), 10mm loop 3910900118 Needle XBraid S, CTX (taper, 1/2c, 48mm), 10mm loop 3910900119 Needle XBraid S, ST-1 (straight taper needle, 60mm), 10mm loop Force Fiber is a coreless, surgical suture designed with a low knot profile and better knot security than comparative sutures with a core. Unlike polyblend and some polyester sutures, Force Fiber is composed of a proprietary combination of materials that allow for a unique braid construction, designed to contribute to its strength. It is a non-absorbable suture composed of ultra-high molecular weight, polyethylene fiber allowing for a durable and strong solution. Product number Description 3910900022 #2 Force Fiber, white/blue, suture, KC-7 (k-point, 1/2c, 38.9mm), 38" suture 3910900024 #2 Force Fiber, white/blue, suture, C-7 (taper, 1/2c, 38.9mm), 38" suture 3910900021 #2 Force Fiber, white/blue, suture, non-needled, 38" suture 3910900020 #2 Force Fiber, white/blue, suture, HC-5 (taper, 1/2c, 25.9mm), 38" suture Cat01585 #2 Force Fiber, white/green, suture, non-needled, 36" suture Cat01586 #2 Force Fiber, white/black, suture, non-needled, 36" suture 3910900051 #5 Force Fiber, white/blue, suture, non-needled, 38" suture 3910900050 #5 Force Fiber, white/blue, suture, K-60 (3/8c, sternotomy, 49.2mm), 38" suture Force Fiber Features and benefits • 53% better tensile strength than the leading competitor.1* • Designed to offer greater tensile strength than polyester and some polyblend sutures, Force Fiber is suitable/optimal for ligation of soft tissue for orthopedic applications. • Lubricious for smoother, more efficient performance. • Blue co-braid design for increased visibility in the joint. • Available with taper, cutting, or K-point needles.
